examples.text: Your agent is about to infiltrate a life or death poker game in a hidden back room of the grand casino. You’re on the trail of an elite society of assassins, each of whom carries a signature playing card corresponding to their role. You’ve received intel from a 100% reliable source about how they operate.
examples.explanation: 这里的 elite 用来修饰 society，表示“精英的、上层的、精锐的”。an elite society of assassins 可理解为“一个由顶尖杀手组成的精英组织”。

source.text: Can you solve the secret assassin society riddle? - Alex Rosenthal
